sourcesContent:
export const linkHomeDesign = {
  // Layout
  pageWrapper: "min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-b from-slate-50 to-slate-100/70 px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 xl:px-12 py-8 lg:py-12",
  container: "max-w-5xl mx-auto",

  // Header
  header: "flex items-start justify-between gap-6 mb-10 lg:mb-14",
  title: "text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-slate-900",
  subtitle: "text-base text-slate-600 mt-2 max-w-2xl",

  // Card - premium look
  card: "bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl border border-slate-200/60 shadow-xl shadow-slate-200/30 overflow-hidden",

  // Form
  formSection: "p-6 lg:p-8 border-b border-slate-200/60 bg-gradient-to-b from-white to-slate-50/40",
  form: "flex flex-col lg:flex-row gap-4 lg:gap-5",
  inputBase: 
    "w-full bg-white border border-slate-300/80 focus:border-indigo-500/70 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-indigo-100/60 " +
    "rounded-xl px-5 py-3.5 text-sm transition-all duration-200 outline-none shadow-sm hover:shadow",
  inputGroup: "flex-1 space-y-1.5",
  label: "text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide text-slate-600",

  buttonPrimary:
    "inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2.5 min-w-[160px] " +
    "bg-gradient-to-br from-indigo-600 via-indigo-600 to-indigo-700 hover:from-indigo-600 hover:via-indigo-700 hover:to-indigo-800 " +
    "text-white px-6 py-3.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-semibold shadow-lg shadow-indigo-200/40 " +
    "hover:shadow-xl hover:shadow-indigo-300/30 active:scale-[0.98] transition-all duration-200",

  // List
  listWrapper: "divide-y divide-slate-100/80",

  // Row
  row: 
    "group relative grid grid-cols-[auto_1fr_auto] lg:grid-cols-[56px_1fr_auto] items-center " +
    "gap-4 lg:gap-6 px-5 lg:px-8 py-4 lg:py-5 hover:bg-indigo-25/40 transition-colors duration-200",

  dragHandle: 
    "flex items-center justify-center w-9 h-9 lg:w-10 lg:h-10 rounded-lg cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing " +
    "text-slate-400 group-hover:text-slate-600 group-active:text-indigo-600 transition-colors",

  nameArea: "flex flex-col gap-1",
  nameText: "font-semibold text-slate-900 text-base lg:text-[15px]",
  urlText: "text-sm text-slate-500 truncate max-w-md",

  badgeActive: 
    "inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold " +
    "bg-emerald-100/80 text-emerald-700 border border-emerald-200/60",
  badgeInactive: 
    "inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold " +
    "bg-amber-100/80 text-amber-700 border border-amber-200/60",

  actions: "flex items-center gap-3 lg:gap-5 opacity-60 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity",

  actionBtn: 
    "p-2 rounded-lg text-slate-500 hover:text-indigo-700 hover:bg-indigo-50/70 active:text-indigo-800 " +
    "transition-colors duration-150",

  // Empty
  empty: 
    "py-24 lg:py-32 text-center text-slate-400/90 text-base font-medium space-y-3 " +
    "bg-gradient-to-b from-slate-50/50 to-transparent",

  // Variants
  itemVariants: {
    hidden: { opacity: 0, y: 16, scale: 0.98 },
    visible: { opacity: 1, y: 0, scale: 1 },
    exit: { opacity: 0, y: -12, scale: 0.97, transition: { duration: 0.18 } },
  },
};
